info.title: LMS Backend
info.description: LMS API with LiveKit video conferencing

get.description: Returns all courses for Step-1 Course Name dropdown.
Returns available batches for the selected course (Step-1 Batch ID dropdown).
Returns modules for a course+batch (Step-1 Module dropdown).

post.description:
Creates the assignment **and** optionally attaches resource files ΓÇö all in
one multipart/form-data request.  No need to know the assignment ID before
uploading; just include the files in the same request.

Additional files can still be appended later via
  POST /assignments/{id}/resources

get.description:
Instructor: list all assignments they created.
Optionally filter by course_id and/or batch_name.

post.description:
Upload one or more resource files to an existing assignment.
Files are stored in uploads/assignments/{assignment_id}/.

schema.title: Response Upload Resources Assignments  Assignment Id  Resources Post

get.description: Fetch a single assignment with its resources.

Returns all enrolled students for the batch with their submission status.
Students who haven't submitted appear as status='pending'.

Returns all assignments visible to the logged-in student
(based on their active enrollments).

schema.title: Response My Assignments Assignments My List Get

get.description:
Student dashboard assignment list.

Returns one card per assignment with:
  - course_code  : first token of the course name (e.g. 'AM101')
  - course_name  : full course name
  - due_date     : formatted 'Jan 15, 26'
  - due_time     : formatted '9:00 am' from the due_date time portion
  - status       : derived badge ΓÇö
      'completed' ΓåÆ student has a submitted/graded submission
      'overdue'   ΓåÆ past due_date and no submission
      'in_progress' ΓåÆ everything else

Optional query params:
  ?status=in_progress | completed | overdue   ΓåÆ filter by badge
  ?date=2026-03-19                             ΓåÆ show only assignments due on that day

schema.title: Response Student Dashboard Assignments Assignments Dashboard Get

post.description:
Student submits an assignment.
Accepts optional text and/or an uploaded file.
Re-submitting replaces the previous submission.

put.description: Instructor assigns a grade and optional feedback to a student's submission.

get.description: Returns all attendance records for the current student for calendar view.

Returns detailed attendance data for the calendar view and course stats.
Matches the UI: calendar with icons, and course list with progress bars.

Returns modules for a specific course (and optionally batch).
Includes nested chapters due to SQLAlchemy relationships and Pydantic schemas.
Does not compute or return the average score as requested.

parameters.name: course_id

schema.description: Course ID to fetch modules for
schema.title: Course Id

parameters.description: Course ID to fetch modules for

parameters.name: batch_name

schema.description: Optional batch name to filter modules
schema.title: Batch Name

parameters.description: Optional batch name to filter modules

post.description:
Student calls this when they begin the test.
Creates a TestSubmission record with status='in_progress'.
If the student already started, returns the existing submission id.

Student submits answers. Auto-grades the test.
Score = (correct answers / total questions) * 100.
Pass if score >= PASS_THRESHOLD (60%).

get.description:
Returns the full instructor view for a test:
- Test metadata (title, module, date, duration)
- Summary: total enrolled, submitted, passed, failed
- Per-student table rows (status, mark, start/end time)

Students who haven't started appear with status='not_attended'.

Full answer-by-answer review of a student's submission.
Shows the question text, selected answer, whether it was correct,
and what the correct answer was.
Used when the instructor clicks the "Review" button.

Instructor batch overview page.

Returns:
- batch_name, course_code, course_title
- attendance_rate (%, last 30 days)
- classes_completed / classes_total, completion_percent
- total_students (active enrolled)
- average_score (last assessment, /100)
Lists all batches for a course, useful for the dropdown/nav.

Returns the batch Q&A feed (paginated).
Pinned posts appear first by default (matching the 'Pinned by Instructor' badge in UI).
Every post includes: author info, is_instructor flag, like count, reply count,
is_liked_by_me, is_bookmarked_by_me, and all replies.

schema.title: Response Get Post Feed Chat  Course Id   Batch Name  Get

post.description:
Create a new Q&A post in the batch feed.
- Students can only post to batches they are enrolled in.
- Instructor can post to any batch (their posts get the blue 'Instructor' badge).

delete.description: Author can delete own post; instructor can delete any post.

post.description:
Reply to a post.
- Instructor replies are flagged is_instructor=True ΓåÆ shown with the blue badge.
- Students can only reply in their own batch.

Toggle like on a post.
Returns { liked: true, like_count: N } or { liked: false, like_count: N }.

get.description: Returns all posts the current user has bookmarked in this batch.

schema.title: Response My Bookmarks Chat  Course Id   Batch Name  Bookmarks My Get

post.description:
Instructor only: toggle pin on a post.
Pinned posts appear at the top with 'Pinned by Instructor' badge.

get.description:
Returns the current user's notifications sorted newest-first,
grouped into Today / Yesterday / Older.
Also returns the total unread count (for the badge number on the bell icon).

patch.description: Marks every unread notification for the current user as read.

NotificationResponse.title: NotificationResponse
NotificationResponse.description: One card in the notification bell panel.

StudentAnswerCreate.title: StudentAnswerCreate
StudentAnswerCreate.description: One answer entry when a student submits a test.

StudentDashboardAssignmentItem.title: StudentDashboardAssignmentItem

One card on the student assignment dashboard.
status is derived: 'completed' | 'in_progress' | 'overdue'

StudentRowResponse.title: StudentRowResponse
StudentRowResponse.description: One row in the instructor's student table.

SubmissionReviewResponse.title: SubmissionReviewResponse
SubmissionReviewResponse.description: Full review of one student's submission.

TestDetailResponse.description: Full instructor real-time view for GET /tests/{test_id}/details
